summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a stellar Fall ’81 first set – overall great performance.
review: The Latvala‑mastered tape captures a superb first set and an overall strong show from the fall of 1981. Reviewers praise both the musical execution and the crystal‑clear soundboard quality, calling it one of the best stateside shows of that season.

ai_rating.rationale: Single five‑star review highlights an excellent performance and high‑quality soundboard recording, leading to a top‑tier rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Latvala masters; reviewers note the sound is great with no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Excellent first set and overall show, regarded as a top Fall ’81 performance.
